overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a Maelstrom gang member with red hair and purple cybernetic arms sitting on a bench in a futuristic corporate plaza. The character transitions from using a handheld device to eating noodles from a takeout container while the camera slowly orbits around them, revealing the urban environment and other pedestrians.

events.description: pedestrian in silver metallic pants walks past camera blocking view of character briefly

agents.ego_description: sitting on bench using a handheld device, occasionally looking up and around the plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business suit walking past the bench toward the plaza

entered.detail: modern bench with metal frame and gray cushioning where character is seated
dark polished wall with large digital displays showing abstract blue patterns
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing futuristic cityscape with tall buildings outside
highly polished white marble floor with embedded linear light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk character seated on a bench in a sleek, futuristic indoor plaza. The character is focused on a handheld device while the camera slowly orbits. The environment features polished marble floors, a dark marble wall with digital displays to the left, and expansive glass windows showing the city outside. Sparse pedestrians walk through the background.

events.description: character puts away handheld device and retrieves a green takeout container from their inventory
character opens the takeout container and begins eating noodles with chopsticks

agents.ego_description: transitioning from using the device to retrieving, opening, and beginning to eat from a takeout container

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green pants and jacket walking toward the plaza interior

entered.detail: green and red cardboard takeout container with noodles and chopsticks held by character

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow orbit, the character puts away their device and pulls out a takeout container. The camera angle shifts to show more of the plaza interior as the character opens the food and begins eating. The background pedestrians continue their scattered movement through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate plaza with view of exterior courtyard

events.description: camera completes orbit behind character revealing MAELSTROM text on back of jacket
child in yellow shirt walks past in background adding movement to the scene

agents.ego_description: eating noodles from the takeout container while camera circles to show the spiked leather jacket with MAELSTROM gang insignia on the back

notable_agents.action: child in yellow shirt and white shorts walking away from camera toward the plaza exit

entered.detail: large potted palm tree visible in the plaza background near the glass facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves behind the character, prominently displaying the MAELSTROM gang jacket with its spiked shoulders and white painted text. The character continues eating noodles while the camera reveals more of the plaza's interior landscaping, including potted palms. A child in bright clothing walks through the background, contrasting with the cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: character finishes eating and places the takeout container on the bench to their right

agents.ego_description: finishing the meal, placing the container on the bench, and returning to a relaxed seated posture while looking around

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking away down the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to a side view as the character places the empty takeout container on the bench beside them. The character settles back into a relaxed posture, surveying the plaza. The environment remains consistent with the modern corporate aesthetic, and pedestrians continue to move through the background as the scene concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous orbit around a cyberpunk character in a sleek corporate plaza, transitioning from a moment of digital focus to a relaxed state of repose. It begins with the character seated on a bench and focused on a handheld device, surrounded by polished marble floors and digital displays. As the camera continues its rotation, the character puts away the device to open a takeout container and begin eating, shifting the perspective to reveal more of the expansive interior and scattered pedestrians. The movement then glides behind the character to highlight a spiked Maelstrom gang jacket and nearby potted palms, momentarily capturing a brightly dressed child walking through the background. Finally, the camera returns to a side view as the character sets the empty container aside and settles back into the bench, surveying the modern plaza as the scene concludes.
